Distribution Landscape: Ridgeline Plot

Ibraheem Saqib Ellahi

2026-07-10

library(tidyverse)
library(ggridges)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.5_helpers.R"), local = TRUE)

# Load data (headers and values whitespace-scrubbed) and validate YAML params.
# All data scrubbing + plotting now lives in viz_ridgeline() (2_R/2.6_viz_functions.R).
raw_data <- cerp_load(params$data_path)
cerp_validate(raw_data, params[grepl("_var$", names(params))])

# Build the plot object now so the chunk below can size fig.height from the
# number of ridges it actually contains (nlevels of p$data$Group).
source(here::here("2_R", "2.0_setup_theme.R"), local = TRUE)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.6_viz_functions.R"), local = TRUE)

p <- viz_ridgeline(
  data           = raw_data,
  group_var      = params$group_var,
  value_var      = params$value_var,
  max_groups     = params$max_groups,
  metric_name    = params$metric_name,
  chart_title    = params$chart_title,
  chart_subtitle = params$chart_subtitle,
  x_label        = params$x_label,
  y_label        = params$y_label,
  source_note    = params$source_note
)
p
